query: SELECT DISTINCT c.callOutcome, c.classification, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM calls c WHERE c.callOutcome IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.callOutcome, c.classification ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT DISTINCT c.callOutcome, c.classification, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM calls c WHERE c.callOutcome IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.callOutcome, c.classification ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;
